latHint: Think a cramped, snug squeeze - not a crowd of people.
pivHint: Festivals draw a big CROWD - but a CROWD-ed space can also be described as how snug?
winText: A snug squeeze. CROWD was the pivot - festival CROWD to a TIGHT, cramped space.
lossText: TIGHT - cramped, snug. CROWD was the pivot: festival CROWD to a TIGHT squeeze.
